title: Robby's Colour Changing Egg Timer - Simply sits in pan as your eggs cook!
features: Fed up getting the over boiled egg, we have solution with this colour changing egg timer
Has easy to read SOFT/MEDIUM/HARD so your know what style of egg you would like
Simply sits in pan as your egg cooks
As seen on TV so why judge just know with this simple Egg timer
description: This colour changing egg timer cooks eggs exactly how you want them, simply sits in your pan as your eggs cook.
